title: How to provide a tracking link via the Back Office ?
bodyHtml:
This article will provide sellers guidance on how to provide a tracking link in the customer service request from their Back Office.


When do sellers need to provide a tracking link in the Back Office?

Sellers need to provide a tracking link in the Back Office when sending a repaired or an exchanged item to the customer. Providing a tracking link in the Back Office gives Back Market agents and the customer visibility into your actions, and handles your customer service requests more efficiently. 

 

How to provide a tracking link via the Back Office ?

1. Connect to your Back Office and select ‘Customer Care’: 

2. On the left hand side, select ‘Product returns’:
 

In this area you will find all customer returns that need to be processed. To remove a product return from this list, sellers can fill in the form to send back a product or refund the customer in full. 


 

 

3. Click ‘Send a product back’:



 

4. Fill the return address, tracking number and the courier of your choice:



5. Click on ‘Validate’ and you are all set.

Note that on BackShip orders, you can follow the same process and click on ‘Generate a return Label’. However, you do not have to manually fill out the required information, as this is done automatically.
